stages.name: stage_1_unsupervised
stages.description: Train Autoencoder and GANomaly on normal traffic.

stages.name: stage_5_stacking
stages.description: Train meta learner on validation predictions.

stages.description: Apply symbolic rules and compute CLAF++ scores.

rule_summary.description: Anomalous MQTT message structure (length, topic, protocol).
Combined TCP/ICMP/UDP activity signature of DDoS variants.
HTTP request patterns suggesting SQL/XSS/upload exploit attempts.
Reconnaissance via DNS bursts, ARP probing, port scanning.
